testcase.name: Comprehensive Sales Trip E2E › multi-bill trip is traceable and blocked by the verification gate

[chromium] › comprehensive-sales.spec.ts:7:7 › Comprehensive Sales Trip E2E › multi-bill trip is traceable and blocked by the verification gate
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByRole('button', { name: 'เพิ่มบิลใหม่ในทริปนี้' }) Expected: visible Timeout: 15000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: 'เพิ่มบิลใหม่ในทริปนี้' })
29 | 30 | const addFromModal = page.getByRole('button', { name: 'เพิ่มบิลใหม่ในทริปนี้' }); > 31 | await expect(addFromModal).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15_000 }); | ^ 32 | await addFromModal.click(); 33 | 34 | const prefix = page.locator('select').first(); at C:\MyWork\WorldFert\winspeed-frontend\e2e\comprehensive-sales.spec.ts:31:32
